---
title: "Untitled"
format:
  pdf:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{tikz}
        \usetikzlibrary{positioning, arrows, shapes.geometric}
---

\begin{figure}[htbp]
    \centering
    \begin{tikzpicture}[
        node distance=0.7cm and 0cm,
        % Define styles for the shapes
        box/.style={draw, thick, rounded corners, align=center, minimum width=6cm, minimum height=1cm, font=\sffamily},
        bronze/.style={box, fill=orange!20, draw=orange!80!black},
        silver/.style={box, fill=gray!20, draw=gray!80!black},
        gold/.style={box, fill=yellow!30, draw=yellow!80!black},
        process/.style={box, fill=blue!10, draw=blue!80!black, minimum width=4cm},
        model/.style={box, fill=green!20, draw=green!80!black},
        source/.style={box, fill=gray!10, draw=black, rounded corners=0},
        endpoint/.style={draw, thick, rounded corners=0.4cm, align=center, fill=white, minimum width=3cm, minimum height=1cm, font=\sffamily},
        arrow/.style={->, >=stealth, thick, draw=black!70}
    ]

    % Define Nodes
    \node[source] (src) {\textbf{External Data} \\ Raw CSV};
    
    \node[bronze, below=1cm of src] (bronze) {\textbf{Bronze Tier (Raw)} \\ \textit{Raw dataset.csv}};
    \node[process, below=of bronze] (dq) {Data Quality Check \\ (Pandas)};
    \node[silver, below=of dq] (silver) {\textbf{Silver Tier (Processed)} \\ \textit{Clean dataset.csv}};
    \node[process, below=of silver] (fe) {Feature Engineering \\ (Regex, Scaling)};
    \node[gold, below=of fe] (gold) {\textbf{Gold Tier (Curated)} \\ \textit{Use dataset.csv}};
    
    \node[model, below=1cm of gold] (ml) {\textbf{Machine Learning Layer} \\ (Scikit-Learn LR)};
    
    \node[endpoint, below left=0.8cm and -1.5cm of ml] (out1) {City Fuel \\ Consumption};
    \node[endpoint, below right=0.8cm and -1.5cm of ml] (out2) {Hwy Fuel \\ Consumption};

    % Draw Arrows
    \draw[arrow] (src) -- node[right, font=\sffamily\small] {Batch Ingestion} (bronze);
    
    \draw[arrow, dashed] (bronze) -- (dq);
    \draw[arrow, dashed] (dq) -- (silver);
    \draw[arrow, dashed] (silver) -- (fe);
    \draw[arrow, dashed] (fe) -- (gold);
    
    \draw[arrow] (gold) -- node[right, font=\sffamily\small] {Train/Test Split} (ml);
    
    \draw[arrow] (ml) -- (out1);
    \draw[arrow] (ml) -- (out2);

    \end{tikzpicture}
    \caption{Data Engineering \& MLOps Architecture Flow}
    \label{fig:architecture}
\end{figure}
